home.text:
- In-depth experience as a web developer, using all the latest technologies. Languages ​​used: PHP, Python, Javascript (Bootstrap, jQuery, Angular, React, NextJS)
- IT Expert, Project Manager on behalf of the MAE/DGCS and the European Community
- Vast experience in operating systems, web technologies, languages development and applications
- Significant experience in SQL database-based applications
- In-depth experience in web management and publishing, content preparation and insertion, and development of backend and frontend platforms.
- PHP framework developer

about.aboutContent: After a life spent in the center of Rome, I moved to a fairytale village about forty kilometers from the city, where you can get around without a car, and from the window I admire green forests. Since I have always loved my job, which allowed me to live wherever I wanted, I intend to continue like this, curious about all new technologies, eager to learn new languages ​​and deepen my knowledge. Consequently, I am open to any kind of collaboration, short or long term, contract or hiring, as long as the project is interesting and the client cares about human relationships. For my part, I guarantee maximum commitment and - as throughout my career - competence and professionalism
about.name: Name
about.education: Classical high school diploma at Liceo Virgilio, Rome; Degree from the University of Perugia in Agricultural Sciences

contact.senderror: An error occurred while sending the message

experience.details: Backend management of a proprietary platform on behalf of Maersk Italia. The platform, which consists of numerous apps, handles all aspects of a construction site (personnel, vehicles, equipment, safety, surveys, etc.). The application was developed entirely in PHP, with the help of Javascript/JQuery, on a MySQL database; Bootstrap was used as the CSS framework.

Refactoring of the frontend of the CercaOra software.
The software has a similar structure to Immobiliare.it, but is essentially oriented towards real estate agencies.
The frontend involves a progressive search within a MySQL database, and the partial display of the results is in tabular form and on a map. At this point the user will be able to purchase address packages for their own uses.
Technically, the frontend was created in next.js. TailwindCSS was used as the CSS framework. Through API it connects with the backend, created in PHP, in charge for queries to the MySQL database. The map view uses the OpenStreetMap API.

- Management of the frontend of the Pitagora platform, for the organization of data, and their representation in various modes (tables, maps, graphs), in addition to the provision of services for the acquisition of external signals and the connection with the backend, developed in Java/MySQL. The frontend was created in Angular (v. 13/14), node.js, Typescript, as well as Javascript, for some modules (e.g. xeokit, which is the BIM visualization and management engine, is entirely created in JS) . In some cases jQuery was also used. Bootstrap (v. 4) was mainly used as a framework for the UI, in certain Angular Material modules.
- Backend/frontend development of the H&D Platform application. The application allows you to manage the various categories of bonuses in the construction environment, acting as a hub between companies, installers and professionals for the estimation and invoicing of the various jobs. In particular, my activity focused on the management of the invoicing tool and the connection with the existing H&D platform (developed in SugarCRM on PHP, whose modules I managed) for the import and management of the related data to practices, records and pre-invoices. Technologies used for the application: Python, Javascript (jQuery), MySQL. Bootstrap (v. 4) is used as the UI
- Unoenergy - Management of SOAP calls from the customer, relating to reminder letters for missed payments, sending standardized letters in PDF format to the printer together with a cover letter created ad hoc, management of receiving receipts for registered letters and resending (always via SOAP calls) the results to the customer. Technologies used for the application: PHP (Laravel framework), Javascript (jQuery), MySQL.

The analysis and refactoring of the frontend and backend of the HappySign application.
HappySign takes care of the electronic signature process by affixing a QR Code to the document and creating an unchangeable and certified PDF, in line with current legislation, which can be used in any transaction, both on the website and via a dedicated app. Technologies used for the web application: PHP, on CodeIgniter framework, Javascript (jQuery), SQL (Postgres)

The analysis, modifications and refactoring of the Geko spa intranet application.
The application is created in PHP/jQuery, on SQLServer server, and my intervention consisted in the standardization of the current functions through the inclusion in a custom framework, in addition to the management of the activity report and the insertion of new functions, such as debt collection management.
Technologies used for the web application: PHP, Javascript (jQuery), SQL (SQLServer)

Conception, analysis and creation of a web-based application, on a custom PHP framework created by me, in a social environment (www.ciaoexperience.com), including APIs for connection with an app created specifically by third parties (both on iOS and Android environment). The application was originally created in AngularJS, then Angular 2 (versions prior to 7); for greater stability it was finally decided to use LAMP (Linux-Apache-MySQL-PHP) technology. The frontend uses bootstrap (v. 3) extensively, with Javascript/jQuery support

Conception, analysis and creation of web-based applications, mainly using LAMP technology (Linux-Apache-MySQL-PHP), on a custom PHP framework created by me (openPHP), for the development of an Integrated Hospital System. The applications were developed in PHP, with support for Javascript (jQuery, Mootools, Prototype), Flash, CSS, Ajax. 
Main customers:
- ASL Roma G, for the development of the HIS / ITS (Integrated Hospital System / Integrated Territorial System)
- ARES 118, for the integration into the HIS of an application for the management of Telemonitoring.
- ASL Roma E, for the development of the HIS/IM (Integrated Hospital System / Intramoenia)

Conception, analysis and creation of web-based applications, mainly using LAMP technology (Linux-Apache-MySQL-PHP), with the aid of CMS (Drupal, Textpattern) and ad hoc frameworks. The applications were developed in PHP, with support for Javascript (jQuery, Mootools, Prototype), Flash, CSS, templating languages ​​(Smarty, RainTPL, Outline, TAL), Ajax. 
Main clients:
- SD Cinematografica (www.sdcinematografica.com)
- Department of Community Policies
- Cartoon on the Bay (RAI)
- Best Western
- Kartos
- Tecnobios
- Regioni (www.regioni.it)
Development, management and maintenance of the Delos project website of La Sapienza University of Rome (delos.dis.uniroma1.it), using the Microsoft Share Point Server CMS
Development of the website of the Provincia di Latina (www.provincia.latina.it), using PHP, through the customization and personalization of the PHP-Nuke CMS

Development of applications on the Internet (electronic diaries, software for e-commerce), using ASP technology (SQL/VBScript) or PHP language
Main clients: 
- Marketing&Telematica (Milan) 
- Enoagraria (Rome) 
- Verduci Editore (Rome)

The creation, management, technical implementations and maintenance of the LazioNet/LazioCity sports website, created on Windows NT, using SQL Server 7.0 as database and VBScript/Jscript as development language
Installation of medium-sized mixed local networks
Creation and administration of client/server systems
Account manager, Internet area manager at Unidata spa, Rome (Hardware Manufacturer and Internet Service and Access Provider)
Partner, technical manager and web developer of Area Network & Communications srl, Rome (Internet Service and Access Provider)

Design and implementation of courses on operating systems (Mac OS and Win NT), client/server architectures and development languages ​​(PHP. C, 4th Dimension)
Main clients:
- Krenesiel Finsiel group
- Ancitel
- CNR/IME
- CONI/ACNOE 
- Link srl

The analysis, design and development of application software, in the management field, including documentation and user manuals
Main clients:
- CNR/IME
- ELF Petroli
- Ministero per il Mezzogiorno
- LUISS
- Tirrena Assicurazioni
Free-lance programmer, developer of custom management solutions
Agronomist at Studio Sermonti, Rome (Professional agronomic studio)

international.details:
IT expert in Mozambique on behalf of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs-DGCS for the analysis and formulation of the following IT projects:
- Land Registry: feasibility study and cost analysis for the second phase of the project: update of the current acquisition platform information, digitalisation of cadastral data, staff training and modernization of equipment
- UMICT (Unidad Movel ICT): feasibility study and cost analysis for the construction of a mobile unit for computer and telematic literacy in the most disadvantaged areas
- Census: analysis of costs incurred as part of the Census project, already carried out
- Feasibility study on possible further extensions of the GovNet project (phase 3)

Creation, within the 'State Development Plan and the Urban Development Plans in Northern Kordofan (Sudan)', on behalf of Mefit Ltd, of the software for the management of surveys (questionnaires) in the main cities and villages.
The system is was created using PHP/MySQL technology, with the use of XML and JavaScript routines, on Apache server, to allow remote data entry and management and processing by the scientific team, in Italy and Sudan

international.company: European Community - DMM (Direction de la Marine Marchande)
international.details:
IT expert in Morocco on behalf of the DMM (Direction de la Marine Marchande) of Casablanca, commissioned by the European Community for the creation of an application for the management of dangerous materials entering Moroccan ports. The terms of reference specifically concerned:
- The analysis and preparation of the technical and functional architecture documentation of the application (called MARIS)
- The development, on the Apache/PHP platform, of the application for the management of insertion of notifications via web
- The development of the communication interface (sending/receiving) of the XML messages that will be exchanged between MARIS and the Moroccan partners of the DMM
- The development of the communication interface with the European SSN system (SafeSeaNet), for the exchange of HazMat (Hazardous Materials) information
- Installation and security (signature, certificates, authentication via SSL) of the application on DMM server

Missions in Tunisia on behalf of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs-DGCS for the ongoing evaluation of the 'Rjim Maatoug' project. The project is part of the Southern Sahara program, with the aim of planting 2,000 hectares of date palms and sedentarizing the local nomadic population. The terms of reference of the mission specifically concerned:
- the coordination of a group of experts, including a hydro-geological engineer and a sociologist, aimed at the ongoing evaluation of the project
- the economic evaluation of the project, especially as regards the costs of irrigation and drainage
- assessment of the impact and sustainability of the project
- recommendations on possible extensions of the subsequent phases of the project
- drafting of the terms of reference for the establishment of a permanent working group that support project management in the subsequent phases of the project

Mission to Egypt on behalf of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs-DGCS for the final evaluation of the IOM/IMIS project. The IMIS (Integrated Migration Information Service) project aims to facilitate legal migration from Egypt, through an electronic portal used as a 'meeting point' between candidates and companies. The terms of reference of the mission specifically concerned: 
- the technical evaluation of the portal (www.emigration.gov.eg), its functionality and the source code
- the economic evaluation of the entire project, including the 'data center' created at the Ministry of Manpower and Emigration, responsible for the selection and validation of candidate profiles
- the evaluation of the impact and sustainability of the project, especially with regard to the network created by the project management with information providers
- recommendations on possible extensions of the second phase of the project
Member of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs commission for the technical evaluation of agri-food projects (Ethiopia)
Development of the Italian Cooperation website in Mozambique – (www.italcoopmoz.org) Ministry of Foreign Affairs

Mission to Mozambique on behalf of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs-DGCS as IT expert for the e-government project of the Government of Mozambique (GovNet). The terms of reference of the mission specifically concerned:
- identification of the current situation of the Government's telematic network (central government, ministries, regional offices in Maputo and in the provinces), including the hardware situation
- contacts with main IT providers, at local and international level, for the study of proposals for the development of the government telematic network
- integration of the current government network with the project and - where necessary – design of the new network
- feasibility study on possible further extensions of the GovNet project
